queries.name: LLM routing
queries.query: all:"LLM routing" OR all:LLMRouter OR all:RouteLLM OR (all:"model routing" AND (all:LLM OR all:"large language model")) OR (all:"small model" AND all:routing AND all:llm)

queries.name: Coding agent routing
queries.query: (all:"coding agent" OR all:"code agent" OR all:"software engineering agent" OR all:"repo-level agent" OR all:"SWE agent" OR all:"agentic coding") AND (all:routing OR all:router OR all:cost OR all:inference OR all:model)

queries.name: Agent systems and multi-agent efficiency
queries.query: (all:agent OR all:multi-agent OR all:agentic) AND (all:llm OR all:"language model") AND (all:efficiency OR all:cost OR all:routing OR all:serving OR all:latency)

queries.name: Heterogeneous MoE inference
queries.query: ((all:MoE OR all:"mixture of experts") AND all:inference) AND ((all:CPU AND all:GPU) OR all:heterogeneous OR all:offloading OR all:scheduling OR all:"expert parallelism")

queries.name: Cost-efficient LLM inference
queries.query: ((all:LLM OR all:"large language model") AND all:inference) AND (all:"cost efficient" OR all:"cost-effective" OR all:efficient OR all:optimization OR all:serving OR all:latency OR all:throughput OR all:quantization OR all:"speculative decoding" OR all:"kv cache")
